text:
The quiet openness of the first space makes me feel calm, almost detached, as if I could reflect freely without interruption. The bright light and minimal arrangement lend a sense of possibility, yet also some loneliness.

In the second scene, surrounded by the colorful and energetic visuals of the exhibition, I feel intellectually stimulated. The R+D wall and text invite me to ponder human relationships with technology. Here, curiosity mixes with a sense of anticipation—what new ideas might I encounter next?
